description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen display with a small cutout at the top for the front-facing camera and sensors. The back is matte and houses a prominent triple-lens camera array in the upper left corner, along with a centered Apple logo. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons and a slight camera bump on the rear. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable appearance. Its overall design is minimalist and elegant, typical of high-end mobile phones.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a matte back featuring a centered Apple logo. The device has flat metallic sides and a minimalist, premium design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge display with a wallpaper, widgets, and a small cutout for the front camera and sensors.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the device and the slight protrusion of the rear camera bump.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte finish, triple camera array in the top left, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the slim edge and a visible red-accented button.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting subtly with the matte gray surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful wallpaper featuring a woman, with the time (9:41), date, weather, and a fitness widget visible. There are also status icons at the top and a notification at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses are arranged in a triangular array within a raised square module at the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the sides: a red-accented button on the left edge (likely a mute switch), and additional buttons (likely volume and power) on the sides, though not all are fully visible.
